license: OpenStreetMap data: Open Data Commons Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0
coordinate_transform: Manual simplification into local meter-like fixture coordinates; not a geodetic transform.
manual_edits: Reduced multi-line station topology to two public corridors and two platform proxies.
Added synthetic spawn points for CI simulation construction.
Added one service-island obstacle to exercise wall rasterization.
known_missing_indoor_topology: No exact stairs, escalators, elevators, fare gates, platform edges, doors, or vertical transfer graph.
No authoritative indoor dimensions or crowd-observation references.
No claim that the proxy matches operational evacuation routes.
paper_use: CI-scale geometry ingestion check only; keep separate from validation claims until matched external references are available.
attribution: Contains information derived from OpenStreetMap object identifiers; © OpenStreetMap contributors, ODbL.
